_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY. Copy to .vault/secrets.local.json (gitignored) and fill real values there. Never put real values in this file. Never commit secrets.local.json. Claude never sees these values — the business owner populates them.

amazonEgypt.note: Once set and a deep link is verified, an owner (not an agent) flips a provider's affiliateStatus to 'AFFILIATE_LINK — VERIFIED' with the affiliateUrl.
